productDisplayName: Maxima Men Blue Dial Ssteele Watch

Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this SSteele watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection!Product DetailsCase style: Rectangular stainless steel caseDial style: Blue dial with roman numeral indicies and steel handsFeatures: Date aperture at 3 hour markStrap stype: Steel strap with butterfly claspWater resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashesWarranty: 1 YearSize:Case diameter: 36 mmCase thickness: 8 mm
